§6Toggle Buses§f:
The §6ME Toggle Bus §f(appliedenergistics2:part:80) is a §ecable part§f that §btoggles its network connection§f based on a redstone signal. It is the primary way to §6enable or disable§f portions of an ME network with redstone.

§6Production Path (network/parts/toggle_bus.json)§f:
Pattern "a / bcb / a" (3x3 minus center top and bottom):
- §ba§f: §6Redstone Dust§f (dustRedstone) — 4 (one at each cardinal direction edge)
- §bb§f: §6ME Glass Cable - Fluix §f (appliedenergistics2:part:16) — 4 (left and right)
- §cc§f: §6Lever§f (minecraft:lever) at the center
- Yields 1× ME Toggle Bus

A §6ME Inverted Toggle Bus §f(appliedenergistics2:part:100) variant inverts the redstone logic — the network is connected when §cno§f redstone is present.

§6Function (PartToggleBus.java:50-195)§f:
- §bRedstone-driven connection§f: a §6high redstone signal§f connects the bus to the network; §6low§f disconnects it
- §bVisual states§f: §6MODELS_OFF§f (no power, no connection), §6MODELS_ON§f (powered, no connection), §6MODELS_HAS_CHANNEL §f(powered, connected)
- §bTwo AENetworkProxies§f: one for the §6inner side §f(connected to the host cable), one for the §6outer side §f (the disconnected network branch)
- §bIdle power§f: §b0.0§f AE/t — toggle buses consume no power at idle
- §bChannel cost§f: each active Toggle Bus consumes §b1 channel §f from the host cable

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 2 items the ME Toggle Bus is a component of:
- §6ME Inverted Toggle Bus §f (the inversion variant)
- §6Network segmenter §f used by some mod packs

§6Configuration (PartToggleBus.java:80-91)§f:
- §eTip§f: attach a §6Lever §f directly to the host cable, then place a Toggle Bus next to it
- §eTip§f: a §6Redstone Repeater §f chain can sequence multiple Toggle Buses to turn parts of the network on in stages
- §cWarning§f: a Toggle Bus will not isolate §bpower draw§f; a connected sub-network will still try to draw AE from the parent
- §cWarning§f: when the bus is in the §6OFF §f state, any machines or cables downstream lose all §6channels§f, including their own §bcrafting tasks§f
